# MuleSoft Twilio Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (4.2) of Twilio Connector documentation.
> See [Twilio Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/twilio-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Twilio Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Twilio Connector 4.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/twilio-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Twilio Connector 4.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/twilio-connector/latest/twilio-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Twilio Connector to Version 4.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/twilio-connector/latest/twilio-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Twilio 4.2 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/twilio-connector/latest/twilio-connector-xml-maven.md)
